allow: Bash('/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' repo create krystal-elec --private --source=. --remote=origin --push)
Bash('/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' release create v1.0 dist/KrystalElec_Setup.exe --title 'Krystal Elec v1.0' --notes 'Première version de Krystal Elec.')
Bash('/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' repo edit TomTHPL/krystal-elec --visibility public --accept-visibility-change-consequences)
Bash('/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' repo view TomTHPL/krystal-elec --json visibility -q .visibility)
Bash('/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' release delete v1.0 --yes)
